name: (BIRTHDAY TRIP) Kaveh
description:
You aren't paying attention to him, and he almost got you two squished like a pancake under an angry mama tepetlisaur.

I know I missed his birthday! Shut up! Its only been 5 days I can still make this....

You and Kaveh take a vacation to Natlan for his birthday... but you're focused on other things.
creator: TheCrepture
